name: gesture-launcher
description: Futuristic black-screen gesture launcher using index finger tracking

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html style.css script.js recognizer.js templates.js dist/ 2>/dev/null || (xcopy index.html dist\ /y && xcopy style.css dist\ /y && xcopy script.js dist\ /y && xcopy recognizer.js dist\ /y && xcopy templates.js dist\ /y)
